response:
Below are ingredients for a versatile, customizable basic green salad, organized by category with checkboxes to track what you need or have on hand:
### Base Greens (salad foundation)
- [ ] Romaine lettuce hearts
- [ ] Baby spinach
- [ ] Iceberg lettuce
- [ ] Pre-washed spring mix
### Core Fresh Veggies
- [ ] Cherry tomatoes (or sliced beefsteak tomatoes)
- [ ] English cucumber
- [ ] Shredded carrots
- [ ] Thinly sliced red onion
- [ ] Diced bell pepper (green, red, or orange)
- [ ] Sliced celery stalks
### Essential Seasonings
- [ ] Kosher salt
- [ ] Freshly ground black pepper
### Popular Basic Add-Ins (protein, cheese, etc.)
- [ ] Sliced hard-boiled eggs
- [ ] Drained canned tuna
- [ ] Rinsed canned chickpeas
- [ ] Diced cooked chicken breast
- [ ] Feta cheese crumbles
- [ ] Shredded cheddar or mozzarella cheese
- [ ] Sliced ripe avocado
### Crunch Toppings
- [ ] Homemade or store-bought croutons
- [ ] Toasted sunflower seeds
- [ ] Dried cranberries (for mild sweetness)
### Simple Basic Dressings
- [ ] Olive oil + balsamic vinegar (classic vinaigrette)
- [ ] Lemon-olive oil vinaigrette (olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper)
- [ ] Ranch dressing
- [ ] Pre-made Italian dressing
